positive: A whimsical, stylized cartoon featuring a sloth wearing reading glasses, enjoying a giant cup of coffee in a cozy, forest setting. Flat vector art style, limited color palette of creams, browns, and forest greens. Clean lines, cheerful, kawaii aesthetic, suitable for screen printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, oil painting, scary, aggressive
